title: Math / Pre-Calculus Teacher — Early College Academy (2026-2027)
summary: Provide students with learning activities in mathematics (including Pre-Calculus) at an early college academy. Develop TEKS-aligned lessons, assess learning, and manage a positive classroom.
required_education: Bachelor's degree from an accredited university
required_credentials: Valid Texas teaching certificate with required endorsements for secondary Mathematics (or DOI-approved training / work experience)
preferred_experience: Student teaching, approved internship, or related work experience
responsibilities: Develop and implement lesson plans meeting district curriculum requirements.
Plan instruction reflecting student learning styles and TEA guidelines.
Conduct formal and informal assessment of student achievement.
Collaborate with special education teachers to meet IEP modifications.
Maintain a classroom environment conducive to learning.
